notes: Need same tweaks as for BIT.TRIP RUNNER: install game (but don't run), delete "deps" folder, run game to generate wineprefix, install d3dcompiler_43 and d3dx9_43 with winetricks or protontricks (better install in from terminal, GUI mode may not show d3dcompiler_43).
title: BIT.TRIP VOID
